name: VERDICT Brand System

positioning.core: Deterministic onchain enforcement for agent economies

inspiration_profile.rule: Use inspiration for quality bar, not mimicry.

logo_meaning.monogram: A court seal merged with a V for VERDICT.
logo_meaning.whiteStem: A vertical marker suggesting judgment, finality, and a ruling line.
logo_meaning.redStructure: The enforceable V-shape representing outcome certainty.

usage_rules: Prefer black backgrounds for primary brand moments.
Use signal red sparingly as a verdict cue, not a decorative wash.
Do not place the icon on busy photographic backgrounds without a dark field.
Use the wordmark for website headers and decks.
Use the icon for avatars, favicons, and app surfaces.
Use the X banner as the default social header.
